title: Verify deterministic report explanations
preconditions: Ephemeral and retained reports contain supported metrics, pace states, typed unavailable states, and one deleted identity.
steps: Inspect explanations for each state, Get and Explain retained identities, request unknown and deleted identities, repeat identical explanations, and scan for uncited or channel-owned wording.
expected: Exact cited template explanations, Not Found, Deleted metadata, deterministic wording, and privacy boundaries satisfy FR-INSIGHTS-REPORT-EXPLANATION.
